creator: hostmaster@GTS.NET
text:
Thus saith Remko Lodder:
| 
| Synopsis: [patch] rpc.rstatd(8) reports bogus info
| 
| State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
| State-Changed-By: remko
| State-Changed-When: Sun Mar 18 16:03:12 UTC 2007
| State-Changed-Why: 
| You are submitting 3.x and 4.x information (as I read it); and beyond
| that you do not appear to want feedback from me or anyone else (You are
| blocking my mailservers, which prevents us from getting anywhere). I
| will close this PR till you can fix your mailserver to accept regular
| actual email.
| 
| http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=110419


	!. read more carefully please - this is related to
	   FreeBSD 6.2


	2. please use "hostmaster@infra-service.ca" for email
	   and re-open this


Thanks,
